title: Phase 1B: Initial migration, seed admin user, default roles/permissions
description: Run the initial Prisma migration for platform core models. Create seed script with admin user, default roles (SUPER_ADMIN, BRANCH_MANAGER, DISPATCHER, DRIVER, YARD_WORKER, RECEIVER, COLLECTOR, SALES_REP, PRICING_ANALYST, PURCHASING_AGENT, AR_CLERK, VIEWER), default permissions, and a sample location.
steps: Run prisma migrate dev to create initial migration
Seed default roles with descriptions and hierarchy
Seed default permissions organized by module (orders, dispatch, delivery, yard, receiving, collections, crm, pricing, purchasing, admin)
Seed role-permission assignments for each default role
Seed admin user (admin@expresslumber.com) with SUPER_ADMIN role
Run prisma db seed and verify
